metadata.description: Collection of custom Claude Code skills for professional workflows

plugins.name: sas-presentation
plugins.description: Create polished SAS-AM branded Reveal.js presentations with light/dark mode, narrative structure, and professional layouts.

plugins.name: data-quality-analysis
plugins.description: Analyse raw data quality using the ABS Data Quality Framework. Assesses seven dimensions (institutional environment, relevance, timeliness, accuracy, coherence, interpretability, accessibility) and produces a structured markdown report with ratings and recommendations.

plugins.name: b2b-research-agent
plugins.description: Research and identify B2B engagement opportunities. Conducts structured web research to build prospect intelligence dossiers, map decision-makers, surface buying signals, and produce actionable outreach strategies.

plugins.name: beam-selling
plugins.description: Guide sales engagements through the marcov.BEAM evidence-gated lifecycle. Integrates with b2b-research-agent output to form scope, build SPIN-based engagement strategy, and advance deals stage by stage with local progress saving and session-to-session resumption.

plugins.name: linkedin-post-generator
plugins.description: Generate LinkedIn posts for SAS-AM in brand voice. Supports pillar promotion posts (driving traffic to website articles) and quick insight posts (standalone thought leadership). Applies SAS-AM tone, Australian English, and content strategy for asset management professionals.

plugins.name: tender-assessment
plugins.description: Scrape Victorian government tenders, score alignment to marcov capabilities using weighted matrix, and generate full pursuit packages for opportunities with ≥80% fit.

plugins.name: push-notifications
plugins.description: Send push notifications via Microsoft Teams webhook and macOS desktop notifications. Use when workflows complete, errors occur, tasks need attention, or other skills finish.

plugins.name: nano-banana-2
plugins.description: Generate images using Google's Nano Banana 2 model (gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview) with web search grounding for real-world context. Creates optimised 1000px images under 200KB with SAS watermark.

plugins.name: sasam-core
plugins.description: Core utilities for SASAMClaudeCodeSkills - update management, loop design, version tracking, and marketplace maintenance.

plugins.name: sas-content-hub
plugins.description: SAS-AM content campaign orchestrator. Draft articles, generate LinkedIn posts, create gated download artefacts, and publish to Webflow. Orchestrates the full pipeline: artefact creation → email-gated download → Webflow article publishing → LinkedIn promotion.

plugins.name: webflow-content-creator
plugins.description: Create and publish SAS-AM branded blog articles and case studies to Webflow CMS. Integrates with b2b-research-agent for research, nano-banana-2 for hero images, and the Webflow MCP for direct publishing.

plugins.name: analytics
plugins.description: Website Analytics system integration for SAS-AM. Provides access to GA4 and Search Console data via Grafana dashboards, data collection scripts, and database queries.

plugins.name: fmeca
plugins.description: Analyse, author, review, generate, and extract context for FMEA and FMECA documents for asset-intensive organisations. Supports 5 workflows, 4 sector taxonomies, and standards-aligned scoring scales.

plugins.name: sas-amp
plugins.description: Develop comprehensive, ISO 55001:2024-aligned Asset Management Plans through adaptive interviews, data analysis, and autonomous research. Produces both interactive HTML presentations and branded DOCX documents. Sector-agnostic with LCC analysis, D3.js charts, and per-section quality review.

plugins.name: ensemble
plugins.description: SAS-AM Ensemble consultant workflow — stand up a new engagement, tether to it, hand work off to the autonomous Ensemble via task packets, sync, collect results, submit your own work, check status, and publish conference decks to the team portal. Eight commands (/init-engagement /tether /handoff /submit /sync /collect /status /publish-presentation) plus a read-only SessionStart greeter.

plugins.name: sas-am-docs
plugins.description: SAS-AM asset-management document suite — a composable hub that authors the full ISO 55001 document family (SAMP, AMP, TMP, RCM) over a shared, code-grounded analytics engine. Strategic-to-tactical line of sight: SAMP → AMP → TMP, with RCM + FMECA feeding maintenance tactics.

plugins.name: handoff-proposal
plugins.description: Hand an externally-authored proposal into the Ensemble opportunities pipeline. POSTs a proposal (PDF, HTML, or structured fields) to the Ensemble's /api/import/proposal intake over Tailscale: finds-or-creates the opportunity by company, advances it to the BEAM 'Propose' stage, and attaches the proposal for founder approval.

plugins.name: project-manager
plugins.description: marcov.GATE project delivery framework. Stage-gated hybrid methodology for advisory and software projects with visual dashboards, portfolio sweep, and BEAM integration.

plugins.name: sasdocx
plugins.description: SASdocX — SAS-AM on-brand document generator. Learn a company's Word, PowerPoint or Excel template once into a reusable Brand Profile, then generate unlimited on-brand .docx/.pptx/.xlsx — off-brand output impossible by construction. Three skills (sasdocx / saspptx / sasxlsx) over one shared OOXML engine. Based on the MIT-licensed brand-docs engine by Ferdinando Bonsegna.

plugins.name: magpie
plugins.description: Mines an open source repo or package for engineering approaches worth adopting. Extracts source with opensrc, maps it with graphify, then researches the map to find what is done well and how, not just what exists. Produces a Pattern Catalogue, attributed snippets, and a retained graph. Requires the opensrc and graphify binaries on PATH.
